meta.note: Merged from initial extraction and all retry passes. Retry outputs take precedence over earlier partial outputs.

parent_entity.value: Restaurant Brands International Limited Partnership (RBILP), controlled by Restaurant Brands International Inc. (RBI)

franchising_since.value: September 2022 (as BKC LLC); 1954 as predecessor BK Corporation

bkc_president.value: Thomas B. Curtis IV (since Feb 2022; ex-Domino's EVP US Ops)

rbi_executive_chairman.value: J. Patrick Doyle (since Nov 2022; ex-Carlyle Group, ex-Domino's CEO)

rbi_ceo.value: Joshua Kobza (since Mar 2023; with RBI since Apr 2013)

rbi_cfo.value: Sami A. Siddiqui (since Mar 2024; ex-PLK President)

bkc_general_counsel.value: Jill Granat (with BK/RBI legal since 1998; BKC GC since Aug 2022)

highest_impact_pending.name: Arrington v. BK Worldwide (No-Hire Class Action)
highest_impact_pending.claims: Sherman Act Section 1 — no-hire clause in standard FA

highest_impact_pending.name: Plymouth County v. RBI (Carrols Acquisition Fairness)
highest_impact_pending.claims: Breach of fiduciary duty, unjust enrichment in Carrols acquisition

notable_concluded.name: Hapema v. BKE (Switzerland)
notable_concluded.outcome: Court found BKE infringed Swiss Cartel Act via coupon pricing. Settled.

notable_concluded.name: Meals Catalunya v. BKE (Spain)
notable_concluded.outcome: Court found wrongful termination of 3 of 4 locations. EUR 1.5M damages to franchisee.

formats.notes: All exclude real estate. Traditional includes optional playground ($0-$245K).

refundability.value: All nonrefundable except limited TRA/MTRA deposit refund and Carrols 30-day refund

combined_mandatory_minimum.value: 9.0% of Gross Sales (royalty + advertising) before rent, digital, local marketing, other

remodel_penalty_surcharge.value: +3.0% royalty on all Gross Sales for missed RTF2/RTF1/Forbearance deadlines

bkl_bkc_owned.value: Min annual rent 10% of capitalized site/construction costs vs. designated % of Gross Sales. 12% increase every 5 years.

bkl_bkc_leased.value: Min annual rent 125% of BKC's rent + 10% of capitalized costs. Escalation: 125% of master lease escalation.

percentage_rent.value: 8.5% of monthly Gross Sales up to $133,333.33; 10% above $133,333.33 — in excess of monthly min rent

default_liability.value: Full remaining-term rent + re-letting costs + attorneys' fees

location.value: Miami, FL or BKC-designated; in-restaurant at authorized Training Restaurants

training_table.notes: No Subject/Hours/Classroom table found. Training described narratively only.

digital_menu_boards.value: Required, sole-source. Static board kit $200-$300/mo if not installed.

digital_services_agreement.value: Exhibit V, 15 pages. BKC sole supplier. Fee confirmed but full terms unsurfaced.

loyalty_program.value: Royal Perks mandatory at all restaurants

delivery_platforms.value: Mandatory via BKC-approved aggregators in serviced areas

purchasing_cooperative.value: RSI — not-for-profit, 21-member Board (18 franchisees), issues patronage dividends

exclusive_territory.value: No. Explicitly: 'You will not receive an exclusive territory.'

franchise_agreement_territory.value: Single location only. No protected area.

alternative_channels.value: BKC reserves all rights — grocery, convenience, internet, direct marketing. No franchisee compensation.

affiliate_competition.value: TH, Popeyes, FHS may operate in same markets. BKC not responsible for resolving inter-brand conflicts.

individual_owner_operator.value: Operating Partner: 50%+ equity, full time, live nearby, no other restaurant business

entity_managing_owner.value: 25%+ equity, binding authority, full time, live nearby

crown_your_career.value: Managing Owner must own 100% of entity. No other business until 5th anniversary or loan repayment.

value_menu_cap.value: BKC sets maximum price on Value Menu items

mandatory_delivery.value: Required via BKC-approved aggregators in serviced areas

mandatory_loyalty.value: Royal Perks program required at all restaurants

prohibited_items.value: No vending machines, ATMs, video games, etc. without BKC written authorization

during_term.value: No hamburger business interest. No use of BK System/marks/secrets outside BK operations.

cyc_enhancement.value: No other business until later of 5th anniversary or loan repayment

state_overrides.value: CA: may not be enforceable. MN: prohibited. ND: subject to N.D.C.C. 9-08-06 (heavily restricted).

term.value: 20 years freestanding; shorter for non-traditional or limited property control

renewal.value: Option (not right). Requires compliance, BKC approval, then-current FA, general release, successor fee, building upgrades. No successor for Big-Box/Delivery.

transfer.value: BKC consent. Buyer approved, training, fees ($2K+$500/add'l), general release, current image. ROFR on same terms.

non_curable_defaults.value: Bankruptcy, felony, fraud, Gross Sales understatement, unauthorized transfer, repeated breaches, RTF default

cross_defaults.value: CYC: any BK FA default = all CYC default. Carrols: any transaction agreement default = FA default. RTF2: program default = all DA/TRA/MTRA default.

post_termination.value: Cease marks, de-identify, pay remaining-term royalties/advertising, return MOD Manual

forum.value: S.D. Fla. or Miami-Dade County (subject to state addenda)

state_override_termination.value: MN: 90d notice to terminate (60d cure), 180d non-renewal. IL: 815 ILCS 705/19-20 applies. WA: Franchisee Bill of Rights may supersede.

property.value: Full replacement cost, all risks, including 12-month business interruption

modern_vs_legacy_comparison.notes: Referenced in Section A introduction but confirmed absent as standalone table on pages 99-103 (RT-05).

item_20_outlets.carrols_note: 1,023 of 1,061 reacquisitions are from Carrols acquisition (May 16, 2024). 38-unit gap unresolved.
item_20_outlets.gag_clause: Some former franchisees signed provisions restricting their ability to speak openly.

opinion.value: Clean — on financial statements and internal controls for both RBI and RBILP

guarantor.value: RBI for most states; RBILP for CA/IL/MD/ND/RI/VA/WA

guarantee_text.notes: Guarantee documents not located as separate pages in Exhibit Q. Likely embedded in financial statement notes.

financial_entity.value: Consolidated RBI/RBILP (all four brands). No standalone BKC. CA addendum adds unaudited BKC balance sheet.

rbilp_2024.notes: Materially identical to RBI (RBI consolidates 100% of RBILP). Only equity presentation differs.

rtf2_program.full_name: Reclaim the Flame 2 Master Program Agreement
rtf2_program.successor_fee: $2,500 per additional year (to bring total to 20 years from deadline)
rtf2_program.franchisor_contribution_range: $90,000 to $725,000 (varies by type, royalty, year, FSS grade)
rtf2_program.missed_deadline_penalty: +3.0% royalty surcharge on all Gross Sales
rtf2_program.cure_period: 1 year from deadline; contribution reduced $10K-$50K if completed during cure
rtf2_program.cross_default: Program default = default under all DAs, TRAs, MTRAs. For Carrols: default under every FA in refranchise transaction.
rtf2_program.general_release: Unconditional release of all claims from beginning of world through Effective Date. Includes CA Civil Code 1542 waiver.

fuel_the_flame.incremental_rate: 0.5% of Gross Sales (added to Legacy Rate = FTF Rate)
fuel_the_flame.renewal_ebitda_condition: $230,000 average trailing 12-month 4-Wall EBITDA per US BK Restaurant as of 12/31/2026
fuel_the_flame.ebitda_definition: Restaurant earnings before I/T/D/A, excluding above-restaurant G&A, with rent capped at 7.4% above 2021 base year
fuel_the_flame.renewal_survey_threshold: 67%-74% favorable vote depending on participation rate; non-voters count with majority
fuel_the_flame.use_of_funds: TV media advertising only. No G&A, digital development, or agency fees (except TV placement).
fuel_the_flame.default_consequence: 10-day cure; uncured = immediate FA default with no further cure
fuel_the_flame.transfer_condition: Transferee must sign Co-Investment Agreement as condition of BKC consent

state_addenda.most_protective_state: North Dakota — effectively voids noncompete, forum, governing law, jury waiver, liquidated damages, general release, one-sided fee recovery
state_addenda.mn_termination_override: 90 days' notice (60 to cure) for termination; 180 days for non-renewal — supersedes FA cure periods
state_addenda.ca_unaudited_bkc_balance_sheet: Added to Exhibit Q per California addendum
state_addenda.wa_buy_back_restriction: BKC repurchase without franchisee consent unlawful unless termination for good cause
state_addenda.notes: FDD-level addenda fully surfaced for 9 states. Agreement-level amendments (FA, DA, MTRA, TRA per state) mapped but not read.

key_exhibits.title: Franchise Agreements
key_exhibits.notes: Via Item 17 summaries only. 90 pages unsurfaced.

key_exhibits.title: Financial Statements + Guarantees
key_exhibits.notes: Headlines extracted. Notes (~80pp) and guarantee text unsurfaced.

key_exhibits.title: Franchise Agreements
key_exhibits.notes: Fully read. 8 critical findings beyond Item 17. See 11_fa_deep_read.md.

key_exhibits.title: Digital App Services Agreement
key_exhibits.notes: Fully read. AS-IS, no SLAs, 6-month liability cap, broad data ownership. See 12_digital_services.md.

key_exhibits.title: Franchisee List
key_exhibits.notes: Extracted: 604 entities, top 30 operators, concentration analysis. See 13_franchisee_list.json.

key_exhibits.title: State Addenda
key_exhibits.notes: FDD addenda for 9 states surfaced. Agreement amendments not read.

critical_findings.finding: BKC owns all data from POS, Additional Ordering Systems, and Additional Digital Systems. Net profits from selling data to third parties are BKC's sole property.
MOD Manual changes deemed part of FA. BKC's 'good faith exercise of judgment' is the only constraint. No franchisee consent required.
65% media spending floor on advertising contribution.
ISP binding: if 66.7% of DMA signs ISP contracts, all franchisees in DMA bound to same terms. Capped at 2% of Gross Sales, 1-year max term.
BKC may publish aggregated franchisee financial data for any purpose without identifying specific franchisee.
Successor notice must be given during 4th year before expiration (not merely before expiration).
Post-transfer continuing liability extends for duration of installment payments. Installment notes must be subordinate to royalty/advertising and non-assignable.
$1,000 BK Foundation scholarship is mandatory annual purchase per restaurant, not optional.

franchise_agreement_deep_read.d1_vs_d2_delta: D1 (Individual) has Operating Partner (50% equity) instead of Managing Owner (25%). D1 includes 8+ pages of entity conversion provisions (Sec. 15.D) for assigning to LLC/corporation. D2 has Managing Owner with parent-entity option via Corporate Addendum.

digital_services_agreement.term: 2 years initial, auto-renewing 1-year periods, 60-day non-renewal notice
services: Digital ordering (App, Website, Third Party Platforms)

fee.adjustable: Once per year at Provider's discretion

digital_services_agreement.warranty: AS-IS, WITH ALL FAULTS. Zero SLAs. No uptime, error correction, or performance guarantees.
digital_services_agreement.liability_cap: Direct damages: 6 months of fees paid under relevant Order Form. No consequential damages.
digital_services_agreement.data_ownership: Provider owns all Cloud Data including customer behavior, usage analytics, derived data. Full remote access to franchisee systems at any time.
digital_services_agreement.ip_ownership: Provider owns all IP in Cloud Services. Franchisee assigns any rights it may acquire in modifications.
digital_services_agreement.indemnification: Provider indemnifies for IP infringement (narrow exceptions). Franchisee indemnifies for Menu Data accuracy, law violations, third-party interference claims.
digital_services_agreement.termination: Auto-terminates per-restaurant upon FA termination/expiration/non-renewal. Provider may terminate upon any FA Default.
digital_services_agreement.audit_right: Franchisee Association annual audit of Digital Services Fee income/expenditures. No independent franchisee audit right.

top_5_operators.name: Tri City Foods of Illinois, LLC

franchisee_concentration.notes: Entity counts approximate due to text parsing. Some names may include partial address fragments. Used as proxy for restaurant-per-operator counts.

unresolveds.description: No training table found in Item 11 or FA operative text. Training described narratively throughout.
Modern Image vs Legacy Image comparison referenced in Item 19 Section A but confirmed absent as standalone table on pages 99-103.
Guarantee of Performance documents not located as separate pages in Exhibit Q. Likely embedded in financial statement notes.
BKC standalone revenue ($1.427B) from unaudited internal statements. No standalone BKC financials except CA unaudited balance sheet.
Value Menu maximum prices not disclosed — set in MOD Manual, not FDD.
38-unit gap between Carrols 1,023 and reacquisition total 1,061 in 2024.

contradictions.description: Cover page investment range ($348K-$4.7M) spans all 6 formats without format-level clarification.
Base Fee definition allows future royalty increase above 4.5%.
contradictions.resolution: Forward-looking risk. Not a current contradiction.
